description: IMGT numbering reference used for VHH FR/CDR segmentation and grafting operations.

37.comment: CDR1 context residue (IMGT 27-38), displayed for continuity but not used as FR2 hallmark gate.

44.comment: E/Q in camelid, G in human.

45.comment: R in camelid, L in human.

non_canonical_disulfide_warning.comment: For VHHs containing an extra Cys pair bridging CDR1 and CDR3. Must be preserved; FR graft must not delete these residues.

notes: This metadata file is intentionally static and should rarely be modified.
Humanization, grafting, and FR/Cdr segmentation routines MUST use this mapping.
For VHH, FR2 hallmark preservation applies to IMGT 44/45/47 unless explicitly engineered for novel scaffolds.
